title: Euler's Formula: The Bridge Between Algebra and Geometry
description: Discover Euler's formula e^(iθ) = cos(θ) + i·sin(θ), one of the most beautiful equations in mathematics, and understand how it connects complex numbers to rotations in quantum computing.
learningObjectives: State and derive Euler's formula from Taylor series
Convert between rectangular and polar (exponential) forms of complex numbers
Use Euler's formula to simplify complex number multiplication as rotation
Apply De Moivre's theorem for powers and roots of complex numbers
Connect Euler's formula to quantum state rotations on the Bloch sphere
